Text.Name: affix_1
Text.Desc: [color=#B0FA6B][size=18] · High Chance of Animals Turning into Beasts Upon Death[/color][/size]

Text.Name: affix_2
Text.Desc: [color=#B0FA6B][size=18] · Successful Alchemy Boosts Scene's Five Elements Qi Based on Tier & Elements[/color][/size]

Text.Name: affix_5
Text.Desc: [color=#B0FA6B][size=18] · Activate Beast Sacrifice\n · Utilize Beast Sacrifice in the Ancestral Shrine.[/color][/size]

Text.Name: affix_3
Text.Desc: [size=18] ·Boosted Drops from Beasts & Animals\n ·Merchants Double Their Goods[/size]

Text.Name: affix_4
Text.Desc: [size=18] · Start with Pet Hua Juan\n · Enhanced Nutrition from Feeding Pets[/size]

Text.Name: challenge_affix_2
Text.Desc: · Enhanced Negative Weather Effects\n · Elevated Tribulation Difficulty
